home.heroTitle: Grounded guidance for psilocybin integration and inner work.
home.heroSubtitle: Research-informed scenarios, frameworks, and tools for navigating non-ordinary states and the work that follows.
home.aboutBody: Maya Allan writes for practitioners, healers, facilitators, and solo journeyers seeking grounded guidance for the work of inner transformation. Her writing draws on peer-reviewed research and decades of facilitation experience.
home.integrationBody: After your journey, there's the work of letting it settle. The integration tool is a free, AI-guided reflection session to help a new experience land alongside an old pattern.

about.title: About Maya Allan
about.lead: Author and researcher specializing in psilocybin integration, consciousness studies, and the practical work of inner transformation.
body: Maya Allan writes for practitioners, healers, facilitators, and solo journeyers. Her work draws on peer-reviewed psychedelic research (Carhart-Harris, Griffiths, Davis, Ecker) and decades of facilitation experience to bring clarity and compassion to a medicine long shrouded in mystery.

Her first book, *Psilocybin Integration Guide*, walks through 40 real journey scenarios — from ego dissolution and shadow work to inner-child healing and cosmic consciousness — with detailed navigation for each.
The site offers free integration tools, scenario reference pages, and a body of writing on the inner work that follows non-ordinary states.
